untranslatable_reason: This signal requires tracking counterparty order flow patterns, participant identity detection, consecutive same-side trades from specific market participants, and real-time order book microstructure data. None of these capabilities are available in the provided indicator set, which contains only price, volume, and technical analysis indicators. The core logic depends on: (1) identifying individual participant trades, (2) detecting repeated same-side behavior by that participant within a rolling 10-trade window, (3) predicting continuation patterns based on participant behavior history, and (4) acting ahead of anticipated orders. These are order-flow analysis and counterparty tracking features that require Level 3 market data and participant identification systems, not price/volume technical indicators.
translation_notes: Signal describes a market microstructure strategy based on observing repeated trading behavior by a specific counterparty (Jon) and positioning ahead of their anticipated continuation trades. This is fundamentally a participant flow analysis strategy that cannot be expressed using only OHLCV and technical indicators. A backtest engine with access to order book data, participant IDs, and trade-by-trade records would be required to implement this signal.
